texto: At it's best,the sensation of writing is that of any unmerited grace. It is handed to you, but only if you look for it. You search, you break your heart, your back, your brain, and then - and only then - it is handed to you. From the corner of your eye you see motion. Something is moving through the air and headed your way.
explicacao: Citação de The Writing Life sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “At it's best,the sensation of writing is that of any unmerited grace. It is handed to you, but on…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, writing-process em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e dia-chuvoso.
